positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, featuring stylized pine trees and overlapping abstract foliage shapes. The trees should be rendered in thick, clean black silhouette against a soft gradient background of muted sage green and dusty terracotta. Composition must be perfectly centered and vertically balanced. Use negative space effectively to create depth. Style should be retro-modern folk art meets mid-century illustration. High contrast, clean vector look, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Lighting is diffuse and flat, emphasizing shape and line work. Clean edges, bold lines, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blur, noisy, grain, artifact, text, watermark, logos, signature, complex details, gradient background gradients, poor anatomy, extra limbs
